inputs.titre: Soulèvement des Gépides contre les Huns

reason: The image depicts a gathering of warriors in a forest setting, likely depicting Gepid warriors. They are equipped with spears and shields, and clad in tunics and furs, aligning with the description. One warrior has a horned helmet which is probably an artistic interpretation. No overt anachronisms or fantasy elements are visible. The overall atmosphere feels appropriate for the period, although the cleanliness and uniformity of the clothing might be somewhat idealized.
